title: Senior Financial Analyst - Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions - Growth Opportunity
company: Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Chennai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions:
Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions!
